name: my-desktop-calendar
description: My Desktop Calendar — Windows native (WPF) desktop calendar

scripts.win:build: npm run build && npm run win:sync-ui && dotnet build win/MyDesktopCalendar/MyDesktopCalendar.csproj -c Release
scripts.win:run: npm run win:build && dotnet run --project win/MyDesktopCalendar/MyDesktopCalendar.csproj -c Release --no-build
scripts.win:publish: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist-win',{recursive:true,force:true})" && npm run build && npm run win:sync-ui && dotnet publish win/MyDesktopCalendar/MyDesktopCalendar.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true -o dist-win

author: Daniel Park
